zh.lifeSummary: 當Rose de Dunston於1216年出生在英國諾薩普頓史爾度斯頓時，她的父親Sir William II de Dunston26歲，母親Mary de Erdington13歲。她於大約1247年與John d'Oyley of Raunton結婚。他們至少是6個兒子的父母。她去世於1283年在英國斯塔福爾享年67歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Rose de Dunston于1216年出生在英国諾薩普頓史爾度斯頓时，她的父亲Sir William II de Dunston26岁，母亲Mary de Erdington13岁。她于大约1247年与John d'Oyley of Raunton结婚。他们至少是6个儿子的父母。她去世于1283年在英国斯塔福爾享年67岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Dunston
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Dunstan
meanings: from a Middle English personal name Dunstan (Old English Dūnstān), from dūn ‘hill’ + stān ‘stone’. This name was borne by a 10th-century archbishop of Canterbury who was later canonized.

habitational name from Dunston (Derbyshire, Lincolnshire, Norfolk), from the Old English personal name Dunn + tūn ‘settlement’. Occasionally the name may also arise from Dunstan (Northumberland), from Old English dūn ‘hill’ + stān ‘stone’.

nameMeanings.name: Rose
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Ostensibly from the vocabulary word denoting the flower (Latin rosa). However, the name was in use throughout the Middle Ages, long before any of the other girls' names derived from flowers, which are generally of 19th-century origin. In part it may refer to the flower as a symbol of the Virgin Mary, but it seems more likely that it also has a Germanic origin, probably as a short form of various girls' names based on hros ‘horse’ or hrōd ‘fame’. The Latinate form Rohesia is commonly found in documents of the Middle Ages. As well as being a name in its own right, it is currently used as a short form of Rosemary and, less often (because of their different pronunciation), of other names beginning Ros-, such as Rosalind and Rosamund .

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Rose de Dunston was born in 1216, in Duston, Northamptonshire, England, her father, Sir William II de Dunston, was 26 and her mother, Mary de Erdington, was 13. She married John d'Oyley of Raunton about 1247. They were the parents of at least 6 sons. She died in 1283, in Staffordshire, England, at the age of 67.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Rose de Dunston est née en 1216, à Duston, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir William II de Dunston, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Mary d’Erdington, avait 13 ans. Elle a épousé John d'Oyley of Raunton environ 1247. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils. Elle est décédée en 1283, à Staffordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 67 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Rose de Dunston 1216 in Duston, Northamptonshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir William II de Dunston 26 und ihre Mutter Mary de Erdington 13. Sie hat um 1247 John d'Oyley of Raunton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne. Sie starb 1283 im Alter von 67 Jahren in Staffordshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Rose de Dunston è nata il nel 1216 nel Duston, Northamptonshire, England, sua padre, Sir William II de Dunston, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Mary de Erdington, aveva 13 anni. Lei sposato John d'Oyley of Raunton circa 1247. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli. Morì nel 1283, nel Staffordshire, England, all'età di 67 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Rose de Dunstonが1216年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアダストンで生まれた時，父Sir William II de Dunstonは26歳，母Mary de Erdingtonは13歳であった。約1247年にJohn d'Oyley of Rauntonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子の親であった。彼女は1283年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアで67歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Rose de Dunston(이)가 1216년 영국 노르섬프토실르 드스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir William II de Dunston(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mary de Erdington(은)는 13세였다. 그녀는 대략 1247년 John d'Oyley of Raunton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1283년 영국 스태퍼드실르에서 67세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Rose de Dunston nasceu em 1216, em Duston, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir William II de Dunston, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Mary de Erdington, tinha 13 anos. Ela casou-se com John d'Oyley of Raunton aproximadamente 1247. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos. Ela faleceu em 1283, em Staffordshire, Inglaterra, com 67 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Rose de Dunston родилась в 1216 г. в местности дастон, нортамптоншир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir William II de Dunston было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary de Erdington, 13. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John d'Oyley of Raunton около 1247 г. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей. Она умерла в 1283 г. в местности стаффордшир, Англия в возрасте 67 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Rose de Dunston nació en 1216, en Duston, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir William II de Dunston, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Mary de Erdington, tenía 13 años. Se casó con John d'Oyley of Raunton aproximadamente 1247. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos. Murió en 1283, en Staffordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 67 años.
